texto: How can you love those who have stolen from you, assaulted or abused you, or tried to blow you up and completely destroy you? How can you forgive those who have kidnapped, tortured and killed someone you love? Yet this is where reconciliation has to begin.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Andrew White que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “How can you love those who have stolen from you, assaulted or abused you, or tried to blow you up…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, forgiveness, reconciliation, com foco em reconciliation e relationships.
